blended.narrative: Le Massif is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 3,701 ft. Looking ahead, 22 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 45°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Wednesday: 5" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Thursday: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 19°F. Expect powder.
Saturday: 3.0" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
